title: Synthwave MIDI Reimaginer - Multi Style
log_ready: Ready. Select a MIDI file, analyze it, then render a new version.
random_style_info_prefix: Random ON: resolved style is chosen from the seed at render time.
random_style_hint: Random Style is ON, so the seed first chooses the style, then the same seed shapes the arrangement.
missing_midi_msg: Please choose an existing .mid or .midi file first.
log_rendering: Rendering new version from {name} with seed {seed}, style {style}{random}, BPM {bpm:.0f}, accompaniment relaxation {repetition:.2f} ...
status_auto_seed: Status: Auto Seed ON - a fresh seed will be chosen on each render
status_manual_seed: Status: Manual Seed ON - next render uses seed {seed}
no_midi_msg: No rendered MIDI is available yet.
no_audio_msg: No rendered audio is available yet.
last_no_midi_msg: The last job did not create a MIDI file.
last_no_audio_msg: The last job did not create a WAV or MP3 file.
tt_source: The original MIDI file. The tool analyzes track roles such as bass, lead, arp, pad and drums.
tt_output: Folder where the new MIDI, WAV, optional MP3, and analysis text are written.
tt_style: Selects the musical transformation style. Presets are loaded from app/styles/style_presets.json.
tt_random_style: If ON, the style is selected deterministically from the render seed.
tt_render_wav: Renders audio without relying on your Windows wavetable or external MIDI synth.
tt_render_mp3: Optional. Needs a real ffmpeg.exe. If unavailable, WAV export still succeeds.
tt_harmony: Default ON. Snaps copied lead/arp/pad material to compatible scale/chord tones.
tt_auto_seed: Default ON. Every render gets a fresh seed. Turn off to reproduce a previous result.
tt_seed: Manual reproducible seed. Disable Auto Seed to use this exact value.
tt_new_seed: Generate a new manual seed number and switch Auto Seed off.
tt_sample_rate: WAV sample rate. 44100 is usually enough; 22050 is smaller/faster; 96000+ is high resolution and slower.
tt_style_instruments: Default OFF. When enabled, lead/hook/pluck/echo tracks use the selected style's recommended GM instruments.
tt_theme: UI theme only. Theme files live in app/themes as .qss files.
tt_language: Interface language. Language files live in app/lang as JSON files.
tt_play_source: Open the selected source MIDI in your default MIDI player for comparison.
tt_play_midi: Open the last generated MIDI in your default MIDI player.
tt_play_audio: Open the last generated WAV or MP3 in your default audio player.
tt_progress: Shows the current analysis/render stage. If it stalls, check the Log tab.
tt_bpm_dynamic: Target tempo for the generated MIDI/WAV. Current: {value} BPM. Selected style range: {lo}-{hi} BPM.
tt_repetition_dynamic: Controls how much fast repeated accompaniment is thinned out. Current: {value}%. 0% = active/pulsing accompaniment, 100% = more breathing room with pads/strings replacing repeated attacks.
tt_intensity_dynamic: Transformation strength for {style}. Current: {value}%. 0% = close to source, 50% = recognizable but rearranged, 100% = largely regenerated in this style. {hint}
help_markdown:
# Synthwave MIDI Reimaginer GUI v0.2.7

This tool analyzes a MIDI file and creates a cleaned-up derivative version using a selectable style preset.

## Important controls

- **Transformation Intensity** changes how strongly the song is rearranged.
- **BPM** controls tempo independently from transformation intensity.
- **Accompaniment relaxation** controls whether fast repeated accompaniment keeps pulsing or is thinned out into breathing space with pad/string relief.
- **Seed** controls reproducible variation. Auto Seed is ON by default.
- **Random Style from seed** chooses a style deterministically from the seed.
- **Play Source MIDI**, **Play MIDI Output**, and **Play WAV/MP3 Output** make comparison easier.

## Modular files

- Styles: `app/styles/style_presets.json`
- CSV overview: `app/styles/electronic_styles.csv`
- UI themes: `app/themes/*.qss`
- UI language files: `app/lang/*.json`
